assets.name: lecture_10_frame_01.png
assets.rationale: Best readable anticommutator board state; it captures the equal-point fermionic operator algebra central to the exclusion-principle discussion.

assets.name: lecture_10_frame_02.png
assets.rationale: Clearest usable review frame for the 1D Dirac/right-moving component equations, including the time-space derivative relation and Hamiltonian form.

assets.name: lecture_10_frame_03.png
assets.rationale: Stable and legible shot of the Pauli-matrix identifications for the alpha matrices, directly supporting the move to the multidimensional Dirac construction.
